answer: Apple's 2024 fiscal year revenue was $391.035 billion, a 2.02% increase from 2023. This figure aligns with the company's historical growth trends.

results.title: Apple’s Revenue Hits $396 Billion, Net Income $96 Billion in 2024
results.snippet: # Apple’s Revenue Hits $396 Billion, Net Income $96 Billion in 2024. Apple’s Revenue Rises to $396 Billion in 2024, While Net Income Declines. In 2024, Apple’s revenue grew to $395.8 billion, a 2.6% increase year-over-year, while net income fell 4.7% to $96.2 billion. Since 2000, Apple has maintained a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 18.6% in revenue and 25.6% in net income. However, both revenue and net income have largely plateaued around $387 billion and $98 billion since 2021. ## Recent Posts.
